item.title: fried_egg_golf: Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 5min After last year's RBC Heritage, Harbour Town Golf Links underwent a restoration pr
item.description:
Fried Egg Golf @fried_egg_golf · 5min After last year's RBC Heritage, Harbour Town Golf Links underwent a restoration project led by @Love3GolfDesign .
In March, @garrett_TFE brought on lead designer Scot Sherman to talk about their work at the course.
Watch the segment from Desiging Golf youtube.com Fried Egg Golf 29 likes, 2 comments. "Pete Dye, TPC Sawgrass, and Harbour Town | Designing Golf" 1 mil

item.title:
PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 14min Jordan Spieth says he feels as much support @RBC_Heritage as he does anywhere.
So, what wou
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 14min Jordan Spieth says he feels as much support @RBC_Heritage as he does anywhere.
So, what would a real "Spiethtown USA" be like?
We asked the South Carolina fans themselves. 3 38 14 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 14min #DISCUSSION — What are the most subtle signs that someone is really good at golf? 39 5 24
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 14min #DISCUSSION — What are the most subtle signs that someone is really good at golf? 39 5 24 9 mil

item.title: willknightsTFE: Kyle Porter reposteó Will Knights @willknightsTFE · 1h Tomorrow, I'm doing a 100-hole marathon to support under-privileg
item.description:
Kyle Porter reposteó Will Knights @willknightsTFE · 1h Tomorrow, I'm doing a 100-hole marathon to support under-privileged kids in DC. I'm a late add to this event but we're over $2,000 in donations this week with time to get even more!
If you can spare a few bucks, we'd appreciate the support!
My page: https:// secure.qgiv.com/event/thehundr ed2026/account/2327030/ … 1 5 28 9 mil
